title: Language Change  - Tab when the internet is off
scenario: Language tab in Device Settings is greyed out and shows "Feature unavailable" dialog when internet is offline
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure the device has no internet connection (e.g., enable Airplane Mode or turn off Wi-Fi and mobile data).
3. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected Poly audio device to enter Device Settings.
4. Locate the Language tab/section within Device Settings.
5. Observe that the Language tab appears greyed out.
6. Tap on the greyed-out Language tab.
8. Tap the 'Ok got it' button on the dialog.
expected: The Language tab should be accessible and functional regardless of internet connection, as language settings are a device-local feature.
